signatureMove.name: Gut Barge
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move the enemy model 2" directly away from this model.

abilities.name: Shower of Gold
abilities.description: Target a single point on the board within 6" and LoS of this model. All other models within 4" of the chosen spot move 2" directly away. The Kaufman player chooses the order of the moves.

abilities.name: Money Bag
abilities.description: Place a 30mm diameter Bag of Gold token within 6" and LoS of this model. The token remains in play but is immediately removed if a model is in base contact with it. Whenever another model takes a Jog or Step action while within 6" and LoS of a Bag of Gold token, it may not end the move further from the nearest Bag of Gold token than it began.

abilities.name: A Generous Offer
abilities.description: This attack is not modified by Evade Stat.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Target model loses possession of one Moonstone it is carrying and this character gains possession of that Moonstone.
